title: SDS-PAGE and western blot analysis
author: Elisabeth Holzer
materials: NuPAGE™ 4 to 12% Bis-Tris 1.0 mm Mini Protein Gel 10-well Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #NP0321BOX
NuPAGE™ 4-12% Bis-Tris Protein Gels, 1.0 mm, 15-well Thermo Fisher Catalog #NP0323BOX
PageRuler™ Plus Prestained Protein Ladder, 10 to 250 kDa Thermo Fisher Catalog #26620
PageRuler™ Prestained Protein Ladder, 10 to 180 kDa Thermo Fisher Catalog #26617
SuperSignal™ West Femto Maximum Sensitivity Substrate Thermo Fisher Catalog #34096
Atg9A (D4O9D) Rabbit mAb Cell Signaling Technology Catalog #13509
GABARAP (E1J4E) Rabbit mAb Cell Signaling Technology Catalog #13733
LC3B (D11) XP® Rabbit mAb Cell Signaling Technology Catalog #3868
Anti-Mouse IgG (H L) Goat Polyclonal Antibody (HRP (Horseradish Peroxidase)) Jackson ImmunoResearch Laboratories, Inc. Catalog #115-035-003
Peroxidase AffiniPure® Goat Anti-Rabbit IgG (H L) Jackson ImmunoResearch Laboratories, Inc. Catalog #111-035-003

steps.title: Gel Electrophoresis and Protein Transfer
steps.instruction:
Load samples onto 4–12% SDS-PAGE gels (Invitrogen, Cat# NP0321BOX or NP0323BOX).
Include PageRuler Prestained protein marker (Thermo Fisher, Cat# 26620 or 26617) for size reference.
Run the gel according to standard electrophoresis protocols.
Transfer proteins onto nitrocellulose membranes (GE Healthcare, Cat# RPN132D) for 01:30:00 using the Mini Trans-Blot Cell (Bio-Rad, Cat# 20-45-111).

steps.title: Blocking and Antibody Incubation
steps.instruction:
Block membranes for 01:00:00 at Room temperature with 5% milk powder in TBS-T.
TBS-T: 0.1% Tween 20 (Sigma-Aldrich, Cat# P7949-500ML).
Incubate membranes Overnight at 4 °C with primary antibodies diluted in blocking buffer.
Wash membranes three times for 00:05:00 each with TBS-T.
Incubate with HRP-conjugated secondary antibodies diluted 1:10,000 in blocking buffer for 01:00:00 at Room temperature.
Wash membranes three times with TBS-T.

steps.title: Detection and Imaging
steps.instruction:
Incubate membranes with SuperSignal West Femto Maximum Sensitivity Substrate (Thermo Fisher, Cat# 34096).
Image blots using ChemiDoc MP Imaging System (Bio-Rad).
Analyze the images using ImageJ (RRID:SCR_003070; https://imagej.net/).
